1744210.name: Dragonary
1744210.description:
Welcome to Dragonary, the game where you can create an army of dragons the way you like. Create new eggs, fuse dragons, improve their stats and increase their rarity. This way, your army will be more and more powerful, and of course, you can win incredible rewards in the way.

Enter the magical continent of Dragonarya, once a dream place, now a desert ravished by the hordes of Darkwing the Corrupted. Only you can stop its advance, take the role of a Dragon Tamer, grow a bit each day until you can take on the troops of your powerful antagonist.

Dragonary main features:

- RPG game, where each role is played by the different dragon elements.

- 7 differents dragon elements, each one with unique abilities.

- Each dragon is unique, the Dragonary randomizer system ensures billions of dragon combinations.

- Addictive combat system: a semi-automatic combat system, where some attacks will be made by the dragons, and others will be played manually by you, super-fast battles where your reaction time will be crucial...Do you dare to blink?

- Story missions, Embers, Dailies, Dungeons, Events, and much more awaits to give you many hours of fun and rewards.

- Rarity system: As your dragons become more powerful, they will increase in rarity, along with the rarity of your account, increasing your rewards.

- Breeding system: level up your dragons to create a new and more powerful egg.

- Fusing system: once your dragons become powerful enough you will be able to fuse them with other dragons, unleashing their true potential.

- PVP system: We will add the chance for you to challenge other Dragon Tamers in a player vs. player battle to the death, with an even faster battle system that will make you hold your breath

Embark on this magical adventure, discover everything this continent has to offer, where its magical wonders are breathtaking.
Go ahead Dragon Tamer, the destiny of Dragonary is in your hands.

Hatch your destiny!
1744210.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
